title: bridge-jmap email_query limit:50 not logged when fewer messages returned on burst
description: email_query uses a fixed limit:50 with no position/cursor. For moderate load this is fine. But there is no detection of the case where exactly 50 IDs are returned (suggesting there may be more), and no log warning. A corrective measure would be: if ids.len() == limit, emit a WARN that some messages may have been missed. This would at least surface the operational issue in logs.
